race.description: Ladbrokes See The Big Bets On Every Event Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: COOL MUSIC (2) wound up strongly last time out to finish 1.1 lengths adrift in second over 1400m at Sunshine Coast. Goes well at this journey with four wins and four placings from 12 starts and looks a top chance with the 3kg claim. TOUCH OF GRACIE (9) was thereabouts last start when fifth over 1300m at Toowoomba after being prominent at the bend. Likely improver with strong top-three prospects. JUNGLE FEVER (6) ran below expectations last time at Sunshine Coast Poly, finishing seventh and beaten 6 lengths. Suitably placed so anticipating a much better run this time. ARAMINTA (8) next in line for the Geran clan.
